variables.label: Nextcloud HTTP Port
variables.description: Port to access the Nextcloud web interface.

variables.label: Nextcloud Data Path
variables.description: Host path for storing Nextcloud application data and files.

variables.label: Trusted Domains
variables.description: Space-separated list of domains Nextcloud will trust.

variables.label: Mail From Address
variables.description: The sender name for system notifications.

variables.label: Mail Domain
variables.description: The email domain for system notifications.

variables.label: SMTP Host
variables.description: The SMTP server address for outgoing mails.

variables.label: SMTP Username
variables.description: The email address used to log into the SMTP server.

variables.label: SMTP Password
variables.description: The password for the SMTP user.
